violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as broccoli) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food was relocated to proper areas. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of food and dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

Containers are being used as scoops in containers of food in the single door refrigerator. Containers removed from foods to be replaced with scoops w/ handles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the hood ventilation systems has an accumulation of dust and other debris. The hood ventilation system must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024

The floors under and behind the cooking equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024
